theme_archetype.description: Editorial + cinematic + film-set UI with extreme high contrast. Sharp edges, technical aesthetic, precision instruments vibe.

fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-['Bricolage_Grotesque'] uppercase tracking-tight font-black
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-['Bricolage_Grotesque'] uppercase tracking-tight font-bold
scale.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-['Bricolage_Grotesque'] uppercase tracking-tight font-bold

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#e6192b] text-[#fafafa] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] font-['Bricolage_Grotesque'] font-bold text-xs px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#ff2a3d] transition-colors border border-transparent hover:border-[#fafafa]/20
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-transparent text-[#fafafa] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] font-['Bricolage_Grotesque'] font-bold text-xs px-6 py-3 border border-[#a0a0ab]/20 hover:border-[#fafafa] hover:bg-[#fafafa]/5 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: uppercase tracking-[0.22em] font-['Bricolage_Grotesque'] font-bold text-xs text-[#a0a0ab] hover:text-[#fafafa] transition-colors

cards.base: rounded-none border border-[#a0a0ab]/20 bg-[#050505] p-6 relative group

cinematic_flairs.rec_dot: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-[#e6192b] animate-pulse inline-block

components_instructions.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80), hairline bottom border. Include REC dot pulsing next to 'LIVE TIMECODE' (e.g., 00:00:00:00) powered by real-time JS interval. Workspace switcher on right. Logout ghost CTA.
components_instructions.dashboard_grid: Dense 'Control Room' grid. No rounded corners anywhere except for pill buttons. Use 1px sharp borders. Add small red CSS corner brackets (top-left, bottom-right) to key metric cards on hover.
components_instructions.charts: Use Recharts. Tooltips must be dark with sharp corners. Grid lines should be hairline (#a0a0ab/10). Line chart stroke: #e6192b. Donut chart colors: #e6192b, #fafafa, #a0a0ab, #4a0b10, #222222.
components_instructions.badges: Auto-synced: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest border border-[#e6192b]/30 text-[#e6192b] bg-[#e6192b]/5 px-2 py-1 rounded-none. Manual: border-[#a0a0ab]/30 text-[#a0a0ab].
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn UI but heavily overridden. border-[#a0a0ab]/20, rounded-none, bg-transparent, focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#e6192b] focus-visible:ring-offset-0. Placeholder: text-[#a0a0ab]/50 font-mono text-sm.

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute. Kebab-case, role-based. e.g., 'login-submit-btn', 'nav-workspace-switcher', 'client-card-enable-toggle'.

motion.micro_interactions: Cards slightly brighten borders on hover. Data rows in tables highlight background to #fafafa/5. Minimalist, no bouncy animations.

image_urls.description: Monochrome studio spotlight casting light in a dark room - perfect for the login screen dark editorial cinematic vibe. Apply a very dark overlay (bg-black/80).
Minimalist studio scene with lights casting shadows on wall grid. Use as a subtle background pattern overlay for dashboard empty states, heavily darkened.
